#!/bin/bash
# Today is Wednesday (2026-04-02), so DAYS=2 for Tue-Sat rule
DAYS=2
echo "Starting GChat sync with DAYS=$DAYS"
python /a0/usr/skills/gchat/scripts/gchat_reader.py --days $DAYS &
echo $! > /tmp/gchat.pid
echo "Script started, PID: $(cat /tmp/gchat.pid)"

#!/bin/bash
# Today is Wednesday (2026-04-02), so DAYS=2 for Tue-Sat rule
DAYS=2
echo "Starting GChat sync with DAYS=$DAYS"
python /a0/usr/skills/gchat/scripts/gchat_reader.py --days $DAYS &
echo $! > /tmp/gchat.pid
echo "Script started, PID: $(cat /tmp/gchat.pid)"
